body.title: Resolve README.md merge conflict markers
body.result: pre-resolved — README.md is clean at HEAD, no conflict markers present; no code change needed
body.description:
README.md has <<<<<<< HEAD conflict markers from a manual edit during the docs pass. External readers hit this immediately. Resolve the conflict by keeping the correct content, commit.

**Affected files:** README.md
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** IN — resolve conflict markers, keep intended content; OUT — new content changes
**Completion criteria:** git diff shows no conflict markers in README.md; file renders cleanly on GitHub
